name: Roaz Temporal Identity
work_cycles: Inspection, filing, and quarry schedules intensify during passable seasons and compress under winter constraints
feast_days: Public observance is quieter and more formal than in Shelk, but still shaped by the Principalities calendar
legal_deadlines: Court and enforcement pressure cluster around accessible travel periods and controlled administrative windows
shipping_windows: Clear-season convoy movement and naval readiness in Silent Haven matter more than ornamental festival traffic
weather_expectations: Winter freezes mills and roads; summer improves trade and agricultural support
mourning_and_renewal_customs: Roaz frames time through duty, sentence, and seasonal recovery from industrial strain
public_language_about_time: Officials speak in shifts, filings, route windows, and lawful deadlines as much as month names
